meaning: not yet published 尚未出版
examples: NYP rotor pumps are mainly internal and external rotor, shaft, pump body, the front cover, brackets, seal and bearing etc.
Adjustable gear tail: NYP can need according to the viscosity, high viscosity pump by adjusting the gear clearance, to pump under different viscosity process requirement.
Nanyang Polytechnic(NYP) is the important base for human resources preparation in advance in Singapore, whose successful experience has had the profound influence in the world.
